{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = The Archer
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Archer]] is a single template of all archery.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
